description_long: This is a modern, square-shaped jacuzzi with a broad, flat white deck surrounding a recessed water basin. The basin is bordered by a narrow, decorative trim, likely made of tile or stone, adding a touch of elegance. The water inside is clear and blue, suggesting it is clean and well-maintained. On one side, there is a set of white steps with handrails leading down into the water, providing safe and easy access. The jacuzzi is elevated on a dark, solid base, which may house plumbing or mechanical systems. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for upscale urban environments such as rooftop terraces, luxury parks, or private courtyards.
description: A square, modern jacuzzi with a white deck, decorative trim, and clear blue water, featuring steps with handrails for entry and a solid dark base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entry steps with handrails leading into the water, bordered by decorative trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the jacuzzi and the steps with handrails on the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the steps from behind and the symmetry of the square deck and basin.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the steps and handrails visible on the right, emphasizing the broad deck.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water close to the top edge
